---
title: "Seurat CPU Harmonized — Mouse Brain 1.3M"
output: html_document
---

**Run on Libra CPU. Estimated time: 6-12 hours. Run overnight.**

```{r setup}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(Seurat)
  library(Matrix)
  library(jsonlite)
  library(ggplot2)
})

cfg <- fromJSON("benchmark_config.json", simplifyVector = TRUE)
gcfg <- cfg$global
dcfg <- cfg$datasets$mouse_brain_1m
prefix <- dcfg$pipeline_prefix
timings <- list()

out_prefix <- file.path("write", paste0(prefix, "_seurat_cpu_harmonized"))
dir.create("write", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

cat("Dataset:", dcfg$name, "\n")
```

## Load canonical allowlists

```{r allowlists}
read_allowlist <- function(path) {
  x <- readLines(path, warn = FALSE)
  x[nzchar(x)]
}
allow_cells <- read_allowlist(dcfg$canonical_cells_txt)
allow_genes <- read_allowlist(dcfg$canonical_genes_txt)
cat("Canonical cells:", length(allow_cells), "\n")
cat("Canonical genes:", length(allow_genes), "\n")
```

## Load counts via canonical h5ad (reticulate)

```{r load, message=FALSE}
t0 <- proc.time()

reticulate::use_python(Sys.which("python"), required = FALSE)
anndata <- reticulate::import("anndata")

ad <- anndata$read_h5ad(dcfg$canonical_h5ad)

layer_keys <- tryCatch(reticulate::py_to_r(ad$layers$keys()), error = function(e) character())
if ("counts" %in% layer_keys) {
  x <- ad$layers$get("counts")
} else {
  x <- ad$X
}

x <- x$transpose()$tocsc()
p <- as.integer(reticulate::py_to_r(x$indptr))
i <- as.integer(reticulate::py_to_r(x$indices))
vals <- as.numeric(reticulate::py_to_r(x$data))
dims <- as.integer(reticulate::py_to_r(x$shape))

counts <- new("dgCMatrix", p = p, i = i, x = vals, Dim = dims)
rownames(counts) <- make.unique(as.character(reticulate::py_to_r(ad$var_names$to_list())))
colnames(counts) <- as.character(reticulate::py_to_r(ad$obs_names$to_list()))

timings$load <- (proc.time() - t0)["elapsed"]
cat("Loaded:", ncol(counts), "cells x", nrow(counts), "genes in", timings$load, "s\n")
```

## Subset to canonical

```{r subset}
common_genes <- intersect(allow_genes, rownames(counts))
common_cells <- intersect(allow_cells, colnames(counts))
counts <- counts[common_genes, common_cells, drop = FALSE]
cat("After canonical subset:", ncol(counts), "cells x", nrow(counts), "genes\n")
```

## Create Seurat object

```{r create}
obj <- CreateSeuratObject(counts = counts, project = dcfg$name, min.cells = 0, min.features = 0)
obj[["percent.mt"]] <- PercentageFeatureSet(obj, pattern = "^mt-")
cat("Seurat object:", ncol(obj), "cells x", nrow(obj), "genes\n")
```

## Normalize

```{r normalize}
t0 <- proc.time()
obj <- NormalizeData(obj, normalization.method = "LogNormalize", scale.factor = gcfg$target_sum, verbose = FALSE)
timings$normalize <- (proc.time() - t0)["elapsed"]
cat("Normalize:", timings$normalize, "s\n")
```

## HVG

```{r hvg}
t0 <- proc.time()
obj <- FindVariableFeatures(obj, selection.method = "vst", nfeatures = dcfg$n_top_genes, verbose = FALSE)
timings$hvg <- (proc.time() - t0)["elapsed"]
cat("HVG:", length(VariableFeatures(obj)), "genes in", timings$hvg, "s\n")
```

## Scale

```{r scale}
t0 <- proc.time()
obj <- ScaleData(obj, features = VariableFeatures(obj), verbose = FALSE)
timings$scale <- (proc.time() - t0)["elapsed"]
cat("ScaleData:", timings$scale, "s\n")
```

## PCA

```{r pca}
t0 <- proc.time()
obj <- RunPCA(obj, features = VariableFeatures(obj), npcs = gcfg$pca_n_comps,
              seed.use = gcfg$random_state, verbose = FALSE)
timings$pca <- (proc.time() - t0)["elapsed"]
cat("PCA:", timings$pca, "s\n")
```

## Neighbors

```{r neighbors}
t0 <- proc.time()
graph_mode <- gcfg$seurat_graph_mode
if (identical(graph_mode, "nn")) {
  obj <- FindNeighbors(obj, reduction = "pca", dims = seq_len(dcfg$neighbors_n_pcs),
                       k.param = dcfg$n_neighbors, return.neighbor = FALSE,
                       compute.SNN = FALSE, nn.method = gcfg$seurat_nn_method,
                       nn.eps = gcfg$seurat_nn_eps, graph.name = "RNA_nn", verbose = FALSE)
  graph_for_clustering <- "RNA_nn"
} else {
  obj <- FindNeighbors(obj, reduction = "pca", dims = seq_len(dcfg$neighbors_n_pcs),
                       k.param = dcfg$n_neighbors, return.neighbor = FALSE,
                       compute.SNN = TRUE, prune.SNN = gcfg$seurat_prune_snn,
                       nn.method = gcfg$seurat_nn_method, nn.eps = gcfg$seurat_nn_eps,
                       graph.name = c("RNA_nn", "RNA_snn"), verbose = FALSE)
  graph_for_clustering <- "RNA_snn"
}
timings$neighbors <- (proc.time() - t0)["elapsed"]
cat("Neighbors:", timings$neighbors, "s\n")
```

## Leiden clustering

```{r leiden}
t0 <- proc.time()
obj <- FindClusters(obj, graph.name = graph_for_clustering,
                    resolution = dcfg$leiden_resolution, algorithm = 4,
                    leiden_method = gcfg$seurat_leiden_method,
                    n.start = gcfg$seurat_leiden_n_start,
                    n.iter = gcfg$seurat_leiden_n_iter,
                    random.seed = gcfg$random_state, verbose = FALSE)
timings$leiden <- (proc.time() - t0)["elapsed"]
n_clusters <- length(levels(Idents(obj)))
cat("Leiden:", n_clusters, "clusters in", timings$leiden, "s\n")
```

## UMAP

```{r umap}
t0 <- proc.time()
obj <- RunUMAP(obj, reduction = "pca", dims = seq_len(dcfg$neighbors_n_pcs),
               umap.method = "uwot", n.neighbors = dcfg$n_neighbors,
               metric = gcfg$neighbor_metric, min.dist = gcfg$umap_min_dist,
               spread = gcfg$umap_spread, seed.use = gcfg$random_state, verbose = FALSE)
timings$umap <- (proc.time() - t0)["elapsed"]
cat("UMAP:", timings$umap, "s\n")
```

## Differential Expression

```{r de}
presto_installed <- requireNamespace("presto", quietly = TRUE)
cat("Presto available:", presto_installed, "\n")

t0 <- proc.time()
markers <- FindAllMarkers(obj, only.pos = FALSE, test.use = "wilcox",
                          min.pct = 0, logfc.threshold = 0, verbose = FALSE)
timings$de <- (proc.time() - t0)["elapsed"]
markers_filtered <- subset(markers, p_val_adj < 0.05 & avg_log2FC > 0.1)
cat("DE:", nrow(markers), "total,", nrow(markers_filtered), "filtered in", timings$de, "s\n")
```

## Save outputs

```{r save}
write.csv(data.frame(barcode = colnames(obj), leiden = as.character(Idents(obj)),
                     stringsAsFactors = FALSE),
          paste0(out_prefix, "_clusters.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(markers, paste0(out_prefix, "_markers.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(markers_filtered, paste0(out_prefix, "_markers_filtered.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(data.frame(barcode = rownames(Embeddings(obj, "umap")),
                     Embeddings(obj, "umap"), stringsAsFactors = FALSE),
          paste0(out_prefix, "_umap.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(data.frame(gene = VariableFeatures(obj), stringsAsFactors = FALSE),
          paste0(out_prefix, "_hvg.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

spec <- list(
  pipeline = "seurat_cpu_harmonized",
  dataset = dcfg$name,
  seurat_version = as.character(packageVersion("Seurat")),
  presto_installed = presto_installed,
  timings_seconds = timings,
  results = list(
    n_cells = ncol(obj),
    n_genes = nrow(obj),
    n_hvg = length(VariableFeatures(obj)),
    n_clusters = n_clusters,
    n_marker_rows = nrow(markers),
    n_marker_rows_filtered = nrow(markers_filtered)
  )
)
writeLines(toJSON(spec, pretty = TRUE, auto_unbox = TRUE), paste0(out_prefix, "_spec.json"))

cat("\n=== Timings ===\n")
total <- 0
for (nm in names(timings)) {
  cat(sprintf("  %-20s: %8.1f s\n", nm, timings[[nm]]))
  total <- total + timings[[nm]]
}
cat(sprintf("  %-20s: %8.1f s (%.1f min)\n", "TOTAL", total, total / 60))
cat("\nClusters:", n_clusters, "\n")
```
